summary: Frontend-only smoke + integration test for Motive animated icon library. Verified home hero, navigation, /icons search + filters + Cmd+K/Ctrl+K/'/' shortcut, filter chips + reset, icon detail modal (open/close via Escape, trigger + size updates in code snippet), playground bindings (icon switch, trigger update, size update), theme toggle + localStorage persistence under 'motive-theme', docs, 404 route, and mobile nav toggle. Core flows all pass.

ui_bugs.issue: Background switcher chips (grid/dark/light) not rendered — missing element with data-testid='icon-modal-bg'. Spec requires background switcher to toggle preview panel background.
Missing hero showcase testid 'showcase-section' (defined in testIds.js as showcaseSection but not attached to any DOM element). 'hero-showcase' also not present.
Missing 'code-trigger-selector' testid on the trigger selector buttons in the code-preview section. Constant defined in testIds.js but not applied.
A11y warning in console: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby.

integration_issues.issue: Copy button triggers 'Copy failed' toast in headless/iframe preview because navigator.clipboard is blocked without user gesture / secure permission in the preview iframe. App gracefully shows failure toast, but real-user copy in the preview iframe will fail. Consider adding a document.execCommand('copy') fallback via a hidden textarea.

spec_vs_impl_notes: Spec expected search 'arrow' → 4 icons, but implementation searches name+tags+description and returns 6 (ArrowRight/Left/Up/Down + Download + Upload which carry 'arrow' tag). This is arguably better behavior — recommend updating the spec expectation, not the code.
Registry only contains 2 Phosphor icons; if 'Phosphor' chip filter is expected to have more, the registry is currently light on Phosphor entries.
action_items: Add background switcher (grid/dark/light) with data-testid='icon-modal-bg' in IconDetailModal.
Attach data-testid='showcase-section' to the hero showcase composition grid section on Home (or remove from testIds.js).
Attach data-testid='code-trigger-selector' to the trigger selector button group in the Home code-preview section.
Add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) inside IconDetailModal to silence Radix a11y warning.
Consider a clipboard fallback (document.execCommand) so Copy works in the preview iframe context.
critical_code_review_comments: Clipboard write should have fallback for iframe/insecure contexts — current impl silently fails in the preview environment.
Radix Dialog missing description for accessibility.
testIds.js declares showcaseSection & triggerSelector constants that are not wired up in the DOM — either wire them or remove to prevent drift.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% (17/18 verified flows; 1 missing feature: modal bg switcher)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only app. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for base URL. All primary testids resolve; main misses are icon-modal-bg (not implemented), showcase-section, and code-trigger-selector. Playground trigger buttons have lowercase text (hover/click/auto/focus) — use data-testid='pg-trigger-<name>' selectors. Icon detail modal opens via clicking any [data-testid=icon-card]; close works via Escape. Theme persists to localStorage key 'motive-theme'. Copy actions fail in preview iframe; that is env-related but a fallback would help.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no critical failures. Missing modal background switcher = feature not implemented; missing testids on Home showcase/code trigger = wiring gap between testIds.js constants and JSX; clipboard failures = permissions in headless iframe.
